common.notFound: We couldn’t find what you were looking for.

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.forcedNotice: You must choose a new password before continuing.
changePassword.mismatch: The new password and confirmation do not match.
changePassword.policyHint: At least 12 characters, including one non-letter.

chat.title: Chat
chat.description: Send a single-turn message to the configured LLM.
chat.placeholder: Type your message and press Enter to send. Use Shift+Enter for a new line.
chat.modelPlaceholder: Leave blank to use the configured default

systemDiagnostic.title: System chat (diagnostic)
systemDiagnostic.banner: This page tests the system-default LLM configuration outside any layer. For real conversations with your entities, use the per-layer chat.

conversation.emptyDescription: Ask a question about the entities in this layer.
conversation.deleteConfirm: Delete this conversation? It will be hidden but kept in the audit trail.

thread.label: Conversation thread
thread.empty: No messages yet. Send a question to get started.

feedback.downAria: Mark the answer as not helpful
feedback.reasonPlaceholder: Tell us briefly what was wrong with the answer.
feedback.saved: Thanks — your feedback has been saved.

empty.startWith: Start a new conversation to ask a question about this layer's entities.

composer.label: Message
composer.placeholder: Ask a question about this layer. Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line.

errors.network: Could not reach the server. Please try again.
errors.upstream: The chat service returned an error. Please try again.
errors.validation: The request could not be processed. Please check the input and try again.
errors.layerNotVisible: This layer is no longer visible to you.
errors.streamAborted: The answer was interrupted before it finished.
errors.intentInvalid: Your message could not be understood. Please rephrase it.

trace.empty: No pipeline run was recorded for this message.
trace.noLlmCall: No LLM call for this step.

board.title: Chat board
board.description: Latest assistant messages and where they are in the pipeline. Cards refresh every few seconds while this tab is visible.
board.cardEmpty: No messages in this column yet.

events.title: Events log
events.description: Read-only view of the canonical event log. Apply filters to narrow results; click a row to inspect payload and metadata.
events.empty: No events match the current filters.

filters.label: Filter events
filters.kindHint: Matches event type as a prefix (e.g. "chat.").

llmCalls.title: LLM calls
llmCalls.description: Read-only view of the LLM-calls telemetry table. Aggregates show the rolling 24h / 7d window; click a row for the (redacted) request and response.
llmCalls.empty: No LLM calls match the current filters.

detail.title: LLM call detail
detail.linkedEventsEmpty: No linked events for this call.

field.initialPasswordHint: Leave blank and the server will generate one and show it once.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.body: Set a new password for {{name}}. The user must change it on next login.
resetPassword.newPasswordHint: Leave blank and the server will generate one and show it once.
resetPassword.warning: This password is shown only once. Copy it now — it cannot be retrieved later.
resetPassword.copyHint: Copy the generated password and share it with the user via a secure channel.

delete.title: Delete user
delete.body: Delete {{name}}? This is a soft delete and removes their active sessions.

detail.title: User · {{name}}
detail.noDirectGroups: This user has no direct group memberships.
detail.layersVisibilityPending: A per-user layer-visibility view is not yet available; use the Layers page on behalf of the user to inspect their reachable layers.

field.slugHint: Lowercase letters, digits and dashes only.

delete.title: Delete group
delete.body: Delete the group "{{name}}"? Members are not deleted, only their membership in this group.

list.title: Layers
list.empty: You don’t have any visible layers yet.

create.title: Create project layer
create.name: Name
create.slugHint: Lowercase letters, digits and dashes only.

members.derivedNotice: Membership for this layer type is derived from users and groups — there’s nothing to manage here.
members.projectNotice: Add a user or group as a layer member. Only people and groups you already share a group with appear in the picker.
members.followUp: A user / group picker is tracked in phase 3.6.
members.pickerEmptyUsers: No users you share a group with.
members.pickerEmptyGroups: No groups you share a group with.
members.loadError: Could not load the candidate list.

visibility.intro: Add a parent layer so this layer can see entities created above it. Only bottom-up edges are supported in this version.
visibility.inheritsFromEmpty: This layer has no parent layers.
visibility.inheritedByEmpty: No layers inherit from this one.

locales.intro: Pick the locales this layer accepts. The system default is {{defaultLocale}}.

attachments.configHint: Must be a JSON object — `{}` if you have no settings yet.
attachments.configMustBeObject: Config must be a JSON object.

delete.intro: Deleting this project layer hides it from everyone who can currently see it. Existing entities created in the layer are kept in the database (soft-delete) so a site administrator can recover them, but no one will see the layer in the switcher anymore.
delete.confirmBody: “{{name}}” will disappear from your switcher and from every other member’s view. This cannot be undone from the UI.

dlq.title: Dead-letter queue
dlq.empty: No dead-letter rows. The bus is healthy.

replayConfirm.title: Replay this dead-letter row?
replayConfirm.body: The bus will re-enqueue this event for the subscriber. If the underlying failure still applies, the row may return to the queue.

switcher.label: Switch layer
switcher.empty: You don’t have any visible layers yet.

fallback.notVisible: That layer is no longer visible to you — switched to your personal layer.
fallback.noPersonal: Your personal layer isn’t available — showing the layer list.

proposals.title: Proposals
proposals.pageDescription: Configure when minted improvement proposals can auto-activate for this layer. Above-threshold proposals run the same activation path admins click, so the snapshot-diff and sandbox-evidence guarantees still hold.
proposals.enabledDescription: When off, proposals stay in ‘new’ until an admin approves them. The auto-activate job will skip this layer entirely.
proposals.thresholdCutoffDescription: Proposals with a threshold greater than or equal to this value can auto-activate. The default of 1.00 means ‘never’.
proposals.cooldownHoursDescription: Wait this many hours after a proposal is minted before auto-activating it. Use this window to intercept anything you want to keep manual.
proposals.requireThumbsUpDeltaLabel: Require thumbs-up delta to be positive
proposals.errorOutOfRange: One or more values are out of range.
proposals.sourceDefault: Using default values — no settings saved yet.

chat.intro: Override the system LLM model and cap embedding spend for this layer. Leave a field blank to inherit the system default.
chat.modelPlaceholder: Leave blank to inherit the system default
chat.modelHint: Used by the chat pipeline’s router, resolver and answerer steps for this layer.

empty.title: No widgets yet
empty.description: This dashboard is empty. Widgets and attachments arrive in a later phase — for now the layer’s scope is established and ready.
